summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration testing of the new Company Ads feature (mirror of Workshop Ads). Verified navigation entry point, create flow, list rendering, home AdsSection merging, featured-first ordering, and workshop-ads regression. Insufficient-funds + successful-promote UI flow could not be fully captured because react-native-web Alert.alert dialogs did not surface to Playwright's dialog event during promote (create-save Alert did surface). Core promote logic is code-review-verified as a 1:1 copy of workshop ads.tsx using the same unified WalletContext.deductBalance.

integration_issues.issue: Alert.alert('تأكيد الترويج', ...) with two buttons did not fire a capturable window.confirm during Playwright automation on react-native-web. The single-button create-success Alert did surface. Logic is identical to workshop ads and code-review-verified, but UI-level promote + insufficient-funds path could not be asserted via automation.

action_items: OPTIONAL (not blocking): Consider extracting the shared Ad list/create-modal into a single reusable <AdsManager advertiserType=... /> component. company-dashboard/ads.tsx (753 lines) and workshop-dashboard/ads.tsx (753 lines) are ~95% duplicated — DRY violation. No behavioural change needed for this release.
OPTIONAL: Files are 753 lines each, exceeding the 700-line soft cap. Split out statusMeta/AdCard/CreateAdModal into small sibling files.

Main agent can self-verify the promote Alert flow manually in web preview (tap a promote button, confirm the browser confirm dialog, expect balance −25000 or error alert if balance<price). Code logic was read end-to-end and is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: initialCompanyAds seed includes cad-1 (featured active), cad-2 (normal active), cad-3 (scheduled/unpaid) — mirrors workshop seed and yields the two active ads required by spec on home screen.
advertiserType='company' is correctly set in both the seed and in the CreateAdModal's newAd in company-dashboard/ads.tsx (L347).
AdsSection.tsx merges initialWorkshopAds + initialCompanyAds, filters status==='active', sorts featured-first via a stable comparator — matches requirement.

WalletContext is truly unified: only ONE WalletProvider, both company and workshop ads.tsx call the same useWallet().deductBalance. Module-level _walletBackup persists state across navigations (not reloads) — correct for a mock.

Tab bar correctly hides ads via `<Tabs.Screen name='ads' options={{ href: null }} />` in company-dashboard/_layout.tsx (L33). Navigation is done via router.push() from profile card — tab bar NOT modified.
Prices AD_PRICE_NORMAL=25000 and AD_PRICE_FEATURED=50000 are shared constants in src/types/ad.ts — same prices for both sides as required.

testIDs are consistently namespaced with `company-*` prefix so workshop testIDs (ads-create-btn, promote-<id>, etc.) remain untouched. Workshop ads screen verified intact (hasCreateBtn=true, hasWorkshopPromote=true, hasCompanyPromote=false).

success_rate.frontend: 85% (6/7 flows verified; promote-confirm Alert UI capture blocked by react-native-web Alert rendering — code logic OK)

seed_data_creation: No seed data modified. A transient company ad 'إعلان اختبار' (id cad-moc0on01-wvk2) was created via the UI in one session; it lives in in-memory React state only and disappears on reload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Company Ads feature requirements verified except the two-button Alert confirm on promote. If re-testing, either (a) use page.on('dialog') + asyncio.create_task(d.accept()) BEFORE every click AND wait >=3s, or (b) temporarily replace Alert.alert with an in-DOM modal for testability. Home URL is /(tabs)/home or /home. Initial wallet balance is 1,500 ر.س (< 25k price) so promote will always fail with insufficient funds on a fresh page load — this is useful for testing error path. To test success path, call creditWallet(100000) from wallet context or top-up in the Wallet screen first.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no blocking issues. The Alert.alert capture gap on RN Web is a testing-tooling limitation, not a product bug. Business logic was read end-to-end in ads.tsx L112-143 and is a byte-for-byte copy of workshop flow, which is known working.
verified_flows: Entry point: profile card testID=company-open-ads-btn routes to /company-dashboard/ads (URL confirmed).
Tab bar integrity: الملف | المنتجات | إضافة | الطلبات | العروض (no 'Ads' tab).

Create ad: modal opens via company-ads-create-btn, fields title/desc/start/end filled, save via company-ads-create-save adds new ad with isPaid=false ('غير مُروَّج' tag visible) and testID company-promote-<id> containing 'cad-' prefix.

Home AdsSection renders 6 active ads: home-ad-ad-1, home-ad-ad-5, home-ad-cad-1, home-ad-ad-4, home-ad-ad-6, home-ad-cad-2 — both workshop + company present, featured items (ad-1, ad-5, cad-1) appear first.
Workshop ads regression: /workshop-dashboard/ads loads with ads-create-btn and promote-ad-1 testIDs intact; no company-* testIDs leaked onto workshop screen.
Wallet strip on company ads screen displays current balance with correct currency (ر.س).
